nodes.label: sanad-preview-fixed.png
nodes.summary: UI screenshot of the Sanad legal app's main dashboard (Today view) in Arabic RTL layout. Shows a greeting, date, a prioritized task list with 5 action items, a 'Start Focus' CTA button, and a right-side navigation sidebar. The app targets Saudi Arabian lawyers and small legal businesses, is PWA-enabled, and offers role switching between Lawyer and Student modes.

properties.subtitle: العمليات اليومية (Daily Operations)
today_priorities: متابعة توقيع اتفاقية السرية (Follow up NDA signing)
مراجعة تحديث قانون العمل (Review labor law update)
تقديم إقرار ضريبة القيمة المضافة (Submit VAT declaration)
properties.footer_note: Optimized for local/home server • PWA enabled

nodes.label: Sanad App
nodes.summary: Sanad (سند) is an Arabic-language daily operations platform for lawyers and small legal businesses in Saudi Arabia. It is PWA-enabled, supports home-server deployment, and provides role-based views for lawyers and students.

nodes.label: Today / Daily Priorities View
nodes.summary: The main landing view of Sanad showing a personalised greeting, the current date, an ordered list of today's priority tasks (أولويات اليوم), and a prominent 'Start Focus' CTA. Acts as the daily entry point for lawyers.

nodes.label: Sanad Sidebar Navigation
nodes.summary: Right-aligned sidebar (RTL) with icon+label links: Today, Dashboard, Clients, Cases Board, Communications, Documents, Invoices, Compliance (badge 4), Tasks (badge 9), Deep Work, Calendar. Numeric badges signal pending items.

nodes.label: Role Switcher (Lawyer / Student)
nodes.summary: Top-bar toggle between 'محامي' (Lawyer) and 'طالب' (Student) modes, indicating the app serves dual user personas with different feature sets.

nodes.label: PWA Feature
nodes.summary: Sanad is installable as a Progressive Web App (PWA) and is optimised for local/home-server hosting. The footer confirms 'PWA مفعل' (PWA enabled) with a Cmd+K quick-search shortcut hint.

nodes.label: Arabic RTL UI Design
nodes.summary: The entire UI is in Arabic with right-to-left layout. Navigation sits on the right, content flows right-to-left, and the language toggle (EN/Arabic) is visible in the header, indicating bilingual capability.
